label: 🌐 API
info:
REST API Endpoints für die Webseite.
GET  /trading/trades   → alle Positionen (JOIN)
GET  /trading/detail   → Events für eine Position
POST /trading/tag      → Tag speichern
GET  /trading/config   → Quellen-Konfiguration
POST /trading/import   → CSV Import

name: CORS Helper
func:
// Wird nicht direkt verwendet - CORS wird in jeder Response gesetzt
return msg;

name: SQL: alle Positionen
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT " +
  "a_open.deal_id, " +
  "a_open.date_utc AS open_time, " +
  "COALESCE(a_open.instrument, 'Gold') AS instrument, " +
  "a_open.direction AS open_direction, " +
  "a_open.level AS entry_price, " +
  "COUNT(a_close.date_utc) AS num_exits, " +
  "GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT a_close.source) AS exit_reasons, " +
  "MAX(a_close.date_utc) AS close_time, " +
  "ROUND(SUM(t.pl_chf), 2) AS pl_chf, " +
  "tt.quelle, " +
  "tt.notiz " +
  "FROM activities a_open " +
  "LEFT JOIN activities a_close ON a_close.deal_id = a_open.deal_id AND a_close.open_price IS NOT NULL " +
  "LEFT JOIN transactions t ON t.deal_id = a_open.deal_id AND t.transaction_type = 'TRADE' " +
  "LEFT JOIN trade_tags tt ON tt.deal_id = a_open.deal_id " +
  "WHERE a_open.open_price IS NULL " +
  "GROUP BY a_open.deal_id " +
  "ORDER BY a_open.date_utc DESC";
msg.payload = [];
return msg;

name: JSON Response
SQL: Position Events
